message:
Add comprehensive bead structure for 15 improvement features

Created 15 epics with 128 subtasks covering:

Priority 1-5 (P0-P1):
- Batch Operations with Directory Import (7 tasks)
- Device State Snapshots/Save/Restore (9 tasks)
- Connection Health Monitoring with Auto-Reconnect (8 tasks)
- Dry-Run Mode for All Mutating Commands (8 tasks)
- Shell Completion Scripts (6 tasks)

Priority 6-10 (P1-P2):
- Elgato Profile Import (9 tasks)
- Declarative YAML/TOML Configuration (10 tasks)
- Scripting Hooks on Key Press (9 tasks)
- Image Caching with Content-Addressable Storage (8 tasks)
- Export to Shell Script (8 tasks)

Priority 11-15 (P2-P3):
- Hot-Reload Configuration Files (8 tasks)
- Gesture Support (Long-Press, Double-Tap) (9 tasks)
- Rate Limiting and Burst Protection (6 tasks)
- Web Dashboard (13 tasks)
- Dynamic Text Overlay on Images (10 tasks)

Dependencies:
- Hot-Reload depends on Declarative Config
- Export Script depends on Save/Restore
- Gestures depends on Scripting Hooks

Each bead contains detailed self-documenting descriptions with:
- Problem statement and solution
- Implementation approach with code examples
- Key design decisions and rationale
- Success criteria
- Files to modify
- Testing strategy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
